summary: Tested major feature additions: 1) Larger sample datasets (1000+ rows), 2) Model Deployment with public links, 3) What-If Analyzer, 4) Public Prediction Page. All 19 backend API tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all new features working correctly.

Backend: GET /api/sample_data/customer_churn.csv returns 1501 lines (1500 rows + header) - PASS

Backend: GET /api/sample_data/customer_segmentation.csv returns 1001 lines - PASS

Backend: GET /api/deploy requires authentication (401) - PASS
Backend: GET /api/public/model/{deploy_id} returns model info without auth - PASS
Backend: POST /api/public/predict/{deploy_id} makes prediction without auth - PASS
Backend: GET /api/public/model/{invalid_id} returns 404 - PASS
Backend: POST /api/public/predict/{invalid_id} returns 404 - PASS
Backend: PATCH /api/deploy/{deploy_id} disables deployment - PASS
Backend: Disabled model returns 403 on public access - PASS
Backend: PATCH /api/deploy/{deploy_id} enables deployment - PASS
Backend: DELETE /api/deploy/{deploy_id} removes deployment - PASS
Backend: DELETE /api/deploy requires authentication - PASS
Backend: PATCH /api/deploy requires authentication - PASS

Frontend: Deploy tab visible in sidebar with data-testid nav-deploy - PASS
Frontend: What-If view renders with data-testid whatif-view - PASS
Frontend: What-If shows 'Train a Model First' when no model trained - PASS
Frontend: Deploy view renders with data-testid deploy-view - PASS
Frontend: Deploy view shows Active Deployments with 8 active models - PASS
Frontend: Deploy view shows public URLs for each deployment - PASS
Frontend: Deploy view shows REST API toggle and copy buttons - PASS
Frontend: Analysis view shows Sample Data section with 5 datasets - PASS
Frontend: Loan Approval sample shows 1,200 rows, 12 features - PASS
Frontend: Customer Churn sample shows 1,500 rows, 11 features - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: Sample data files correctly served via StaticFiles mount at /api/sample_data/
Deploy endpoints properly protected with require_auth() decorator
Public endpoints (/api/public/model, /api/public/predict) correctly allow unauthenticated access
Disabled deployments correctly return 403 on public access
Public prediction page correctly renders at /predict/{deploy_id} path
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
What-If view correctly shows 'Train a Model First' when no model available
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test deployments from backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major feature additions tested: 1) Sample datasets now 1000+ rows served via /api/sample_data/. 2) Model deployment creates public URL at /predict/{deploy_id}. Deploy flow: train model -> Deploy tab -> click Deploy -> get public link. 3) What-If analyzer requires trained model to function. 4) Public prediction page rendered by AppWrapper checking window.location.pathname. Key data-testids: nav-whatif, nav-deploy, whatif-view, whatif-init-btn, deploy-view, deploy-btn-*, deployment-*, toggle-deploy-*, delete-deploy-*, copy-url-*, api-toggle-*, public-predict-page, public-predict-btn, prediction-result, prediction-value. Sample datasets: sample-dataset-0 (Loan Approval 1200 rows), sample-dataset-1 (House Prices 1000), sample-dataset-2 (Insurance 1100), sample-dataset-3 (Customer Churn 1500), sample-dataset-4 (Customer Segmentation 1000).
